description:
Comprehensive Hardware Analysis, Monitoring and Reporting for Windows and DOS.


- Added support of Aqua Computer AMPINEL.
- Fixed Auto Start on some systems using localized Windows.
- Added sensor values for maximum and rated GPU power limit for NVIDIA GPUs.
- Added option to disable USB Type-C PD access.
- Fixed DIMM polling on ASUS TRX50/WRX90 systems with new BIOS.
- Improved Nova Lake support.
